brand_identity.vibe: Cinematic, deep, trustworthy, expensive, oceanic but avoiding clichés. High-end video production demands high-end presentation.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050A14]/70 border-b border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
surface_strategies.marketing_cards: Bento Grid: Overflow hidden, relative positioning, bg-white/5, hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors, p-8 or p-12
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders: flat background (#0B1325), 1px solid border-white/10, no shadow, sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm)
surface_strategies.premium_tier: Tracing Beam: animated linear gradient border to highlight the $1050-2000 tier

layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Tetris Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, wide gap-8). Asymmetrical spans.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, lg:grid-cols-12, tight gap-4). Fill all pixels.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strictly left-aligned for data and paragraphs. Optical alignment for icons.

images.usage: Hero background with bg-black/40 overlay. Max overlay opacity.
Auth page split-screen background, or subtle masked texture in the dashboard background.
Demo Videos thumbnail or Service Tiers visual.

homepage.hero: Massive serif typography overlapping the background image. Overlay gradient bg-gradient-to-r from-[#050A14]/90 to-transparent. CTA is bright Coral.
homepage.demo_videos: Bento grid with hover scale on images, glowing play buttons.
homepage.service_tiers: 3-column layout. Basic and Standard use subtle borders. Premium uses the Tracing Beam border and a subtle Coral glow.

client_dashboard.overview: Control Room Grid layout. Minimalist, dense data visualization. Mono fonts for numbers.
client_dashboard.operational_chain_timeline: Horizontal 'Film Strip' layout for the 12 stages. Each stage is a grid item with border-r and border-b. Active stage lights up with Coral top border and white text. Inactive stages are dimmed text-slate-500. Use JetBrains Mono for stage numbers.
client_dashboard.documents_area: Data list using Shadcn Table customized to have no outer card wrapper. Hover effects on rows. Use Phosphor Icons for PDF/TXT.
client_dashboard.chat: Minimalist chat feed, left-aligned, distinct background shades for client vs manager. Sticky input area.

libraries_and_tools.icons: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for high-end feel)
libraries_and_tools.motion: framer-motion (for tracing beams and staggered list entrances), lenis (for momentum scrolling)
libraries_and_tools.components: Shadcn UI (Table, Dialog for New Project Form, Tabs, ScrollArea)

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use generic Shadcn Cards for the marketing pages. Use pure HTML/Tailwind to create bento layouts.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling for the marketing pages.
Do NOT use teal or purple. Stick strictly to the Abyssal Navy (#050A14) and Luminous Coral (#FF6B6B) palette.
Ensure the header is sticky with Crystal Glassmorphism, not a flat color.
For the 12-stage Operational Chain, map it as an array of 12 steps and visualize as a horizontal or vertical track.
